minor_fey.text: Safe guidance through the woods
A hidden shortcut or secret path
To keep watch while you sleep
Exquisite craftwork (nonmagical, up to 500gp)
Fair weather until sunset
A pouch of helpful herbs
Whispers about local rumors
A minor charm against insects and pests
A nudge of luck on a simple task
To distract a foe with mischief
Animal friendship with a small creature
A firefly lantern that glows when danger nears
A lullaby that soothes nightmares
Fresh trail rations flavored with honey
A map sketched in dew that lasts until noon
A single message carried on the wind
Temporary resistance to insect bites and thorns
A harmless illusion for entertainment
A name of a friendly local guide
Footprints that softly glow in darkness (1 hour)

major_fey.text: The shortest path to your destination (clears obstacles)
Temporary resistance to cold, fire, or lightning
A minor magic item attuned to nature
Speak with animals or plants for a day
A powerful secret about a local threat
A charm that blesses a weapon with fey light
A temporary boon of luck on a crucial endeavor
To bind an enemy with thorny vines once
An introduction to a notable courtier
A night’s sanctuary hidden from scrying
A charm of safe passage within their domain
A dream sending to deliver a message
A vial of moonlight (one use, subtle illumination)
Winds that fill your sails or speed your steps
A glamour that alters appearance for a day
A geas-lite vow that bolsters resolve (roleplay boon)
A ward that repels minor fey for a night
A clue that solves a current puzzle
A key phrase that opens a hidden gate
A gentle curse placed on your enemy’s pride

archfey.text: Weather reshaped across miles for a day
A fey charm of the wanderer (travel boons)
A great secret that shifts the balance of power
A portal briefly opened to another plane
Unnatural longevity (years shaved from age)
Destiny nudged: a prophecy fulfilled or averted
A miracle boon akin to a wish (limited scope)
A champion’s mantle: social rank in their court
An ancestral blessing for your bloodline
A relic of the court (major magic item)
A true name of a powerful foe (leverage)
A sanctuary that endures for a season
An oathbound retainer from the fey court
A mantle that turns aside deadly harm once
A dance that rewrites a single memory’s meaning
A star-map revealing a path between worlds
Censure lifted from a cursed lineage
Night markets opened to you for a year
The blessing of tongues in fey realms
The power to call their name for aid once
